stories.title: Antonelli Makes F1 History — Youngest Championship Leader Ever
stories.angle: Historic milestone deepens; championship lead after Japan; Mercedes vs. Mercedes title fight

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli is 19 years old and leads the F1 World Championship.

He just broke Lewis Hamilton's record for youngest championship leader.

The driver who REPLACED Hamilton. Breaking HIS record.

The 2026 season just got interesting. #F1Fanrecap #F1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
YOUNGEST F1 CHAMPIONSHIP LEADER IN HISTORY.

Antonelli: 19 years, 216 days.
Hamilton's old record: 22 years, 5 months.

Also first Italian to lead standings since 2005.

This kid is SPECIAL. #F1Fanrecap #JapaneseGP

article.headline: Antonelli Becomes Youngest F1 Championship Leader in History After Japanese GP Victory

image_concepts.label: Image 1A
image_concepts.composition: Antonelli on podium or celebrating in car. Text overlay: "YOUNGEST EVER" in massive racing red Bebas Neue. Below: "F1 CHAMPIONSHIP LEADER" in white. Stat bar: "19 YEARS · 216 DAYS" in gold. Bottom: "BEATS HAMILTON'S 2007 RECORD" in white Montserrat.

image_concepts.label: Image 1B
image_concepts.composition: Antonelli in cockpit or victory celebration. Dark overlay. Points table: "ANTONELLI 72 · RUSSELL 63" in white Montserrat. Title: "LEADS THE WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP" in racing red Bebas Neue. Subtext: "3 RACES · 2 WINS" in gold.

stories.title: Bearman's 50G Crash Exposes Safety Crisis
stories.angle: Safety controversy; FIA response; 2026 regulations under scrutiny

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Oliver Bearman hit the barrier at OVER 300 km/h in a 50G crash.

The reason? A 45 km/h speed gap from energy harvest differences.

The Alpine warning lights weren't even on. Bearman had NO warning.

The FIA MUST fix this before Miami. #F1Fanrecap #F1Safety

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Piastri had a near-miss with Hulkenberg IN PRACTICE with the same issue.

Sainz is demanding FIA action. Drivers are furious.

The FIA has scheduled April meetings to review the 2026 energy rules.

Japan was a wake-up call. #F1Fanrecap #F1

article.headline: Bearman's 50G Crash Exposes F1 Safety Crisis — FIA Schedules Urgent Review of 2026 Regulations

image_concepts.label: Image 2A
image_concepts.composition: Bearman car in action (pre-crash circuit shot, not crash imagery). Dark red overlay. Text: "50G IMPACT" in massive racing red at top. Below: "45 KM/H CLOSING SPEED DIFFERENTIAL" in white. Bottom dark bar: "FIA SAFETY MEETINGS SCHEDULED — APRIL" in gold.

image_concepts.label: Image 2B
image_concepts.composition: Driver in cockpit from above or helmet close-up. Dark overlay. Text: "F1'S SAFETY PROBLEM" in racing red Bebas Neue large. Below: "2026 RULES UNDER REVIEW" in white. Subtext: "FIA TO ACT BEFORE MIAMI" in gold Montserrat.

stories.title: Piastri P2 in His First Race Start of 2026 — Safety Car Denies McLaren Shock Win
stories.angle: Piastri's unlucky result; McLaren's real pace; championship gap closing

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Oscar Piastri hadn't started a 2026 race before Sunday.

He led for 22 laps and nearly won the Japanese GP.

Safety car timing denied him the win. He was beaten only by fortune.

McLaren is a genuine threat to Mercedes. #F1Fanrecap #McLaren

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Piastri on Sunday:

"Probably one of my best weekends in F1."

First race start of 2026. Led the race. Finished P2.

McLaren is BACK in this championship. #F1Fanrecap #JapaneseGP

article.headline: Piastri Leads 22 Laps and Finishes P2 in First 2026 Race Start — McLaren Is Mercedes' Closest Rival

image_concepts.label: Image 3A
image_concepts.composition: Piastri on track in McLaren papaya livery. Text: "22 LAPS LED" in gold Bebas Neue large. Below: "FIRST RACE OF 2026 — P2" in white. Subtext: "SAFETY CAR COST HIM THE WIN" in racing red small caps.

image_concepts.label: Image 3B
image_concepts.composition: McLaren pit action or both cars on track. Text: "MCLAREN ARE BACK" in racing red Bebas Neue. Below: "P2 · P5 SUZUKA — 56 CONSTRUCTORS PTS" in white. Subtext: "PIASTRI: 'ONE OF MY BEST WEEKENDS IN F1'" in gold Montserrat.

stories.title: Verstappen/Red Bull Crisis Deepens — 5-Week Break to Regroup
stories.angle: Post-Japan reaction; what's wrong with the RB22; Miami timeline

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen at Suzuka:

P8. 9th in the championship. 12 points from 3 races.

His rookie teammate out-qualified him AGAIN.

Red Bull has 5 weeks before Miami. They need every minute. #F1Fanrecap #RedBull

article.headline: Verstappen and Red Bull's Season Keeps Getting Worse — P8 at Japan, Five Weeks to Find Answers

image_concepts.label: Image 4A
image_concepts.composition: Verstappen in RB22 on track. Dark tinted overlay. Text: "P8. 9TH IN THE CHAMPIONSHIP." in white Bebas Neue. Below: "RED BULL HAS A PROBLEM" in racing red large. Subtext: "12 POINTS FROM 3 RACES" in gold.

stories.title: Championship Standings After Japan — Full Picture
stories.angle: Clear picture of the season's state after 3 races

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
F1 2026 standings after 3 races:

DRIVERS: Antonelli 72 · Russell 63 · Leclerc 34 · Hamilton 33
CONSTRUCTORS: Mercedes 135 · Ferrari 90 · McLaren 56 · Red Bull 16

This is not what anyone expected. #F1Fanrecap #F1

article.headline: F1 2026 Championship Standings After Japan — Antonelli Leads, Red Bull in Crisis, McLaren Emerging

image_concepts.label: Image 5A
image_concepts.composition: Aerial circuit shot as background with dark overlay. Title: "2026 F1 STANDINGS" in gold Bebas Neue large. Table layout: Drivers (Antonelli 72, Russell 63, Leclerc 34, Hamilton 33) in white left column. Constructors (Mercedes 135, Ferrari 90, McLaren 56, Red Bull 16) in white right column. "AFTER 3 OF 22 RACES" in racing red at bottom.

stories.title: F1's 5-Week Break — Miami GP May 3 Is Next
stories.angle: The break and what teams need to solve; Miami preview

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
F1 is taking a 5-week break. Miami GP is next — May 3.

Red Bull needs to fix the RB22.
McLaren needs to close the gap.
FIA needs to address the safety rules.

Plenty of work to do before the lights go out in Miami. #F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP

image_concepts.label: Image 6A
image_concepts.composition: Miami cityscape background with dark overlay. Text: "NEXT STOP: MIAMI" in racing red Bebas Neue large. Below: "MAY 3, 2026 · SPRINT WEEKEND" in white. Subtext: "5 WEEKS AWAY" in gold Montserrat.

stories.title: Antonelli Denied Champagne — Under Japan's Legal Age of 20
stories.angle: Human interest moment after history-making win

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli: youngest F1 championship leader in history.

Also: couldn't legally drink champagne at his own podium.

Japan's legal drinking age is 20. He got sparkling water.

Still the best story in motorsport. #F1Fanrecap #JapaneseGP

image_concepts.label: Image 7A
image_concepts.composition: Antonelli on podium. Text: "TOO YOUNG FOR CHAMPAGNE" in racing red Bebas Neue. Below: "YOUNGEST F1 CHAMPIONSHIP LEADER EVER" in gold. Subtext: "JAPAN'S LEGAL DRINKING AGE: 20" in white small Montserrat.
